records.m_Talk_ENG: After much debate, you came to the conclusion
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nach langen 95nberlegungen bist du zum Schluss gekommen,
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.
records.m_Talk_DEU: dass diese Mitarbeiterin, 9588ber die du so viel nachgedacht hast, absolut unverzichtbar f9588r die Zukunft des Unternehmens ist.
records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que cette employ959e 959tait un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.
records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.
records.m_Talk_FRA: de rester 95p ses c9580t959s et la soutenir, peu importe les cons959quences.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to the internet you introduced me to last time, I've been learning about a new world every single day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to the internet you introduced me to last time, I've been learning about a new world every single day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to the internet you introduced me to last time, I've been learning about a new world every single day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I also learned that when something is carefully prepared and thoughtfully refined, rather than left just as it is, the feelings behind it can be conveyed much more deeply.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I also learned that when something is carefully prepared and thoughtfully refined, rather than left just as it is, the feelings behind it can be conveyed much more deeply.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I also learned that when something is carefully prepared and thoughtfully refined, rather than left just as it is, the feelings behind it can be conveyed much more deeply.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, what do you think I prepared this time?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, what do you think I prepared this time?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, what do you think I prepared this time?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tada. I baked this strawberry cream cake myself. I practiced very hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tada. I baked this strawberry cream cake myself. I practiced very hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tada. I baked this strawberry cream cake myself. I practiced very hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Were you surprised that it isn't grass? Fufu. I've learned by now that making someone happy takes care and sincerity.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Were you surprised that it isn't grass? Fufu. I've learned by now that making someone happy takes care and sincerity.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Were you surprised that it isn't grass? Fufu. I've learned by now that making someone happy takes care and sincerity.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seeing how a single small strawberry can bloom into something as delicate and sweet as this cake felt like a kind of magic to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seeing how a single small strawberry can bloom into something as delicate and sweet as this cake felt like a kind of magic to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seeing how a single small strawberry can bloom into something as delicate and sweet as this cake felt like a kind of magic to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I suppose you could say it's the warmest expression of change, shaped by the wish to do something for someone else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I suppose you could say it's the warmest expression of change, shaped by the wish to do something for someone else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I suppose you could say it's the warmest expression of change, shaped by the wish to do something for someone else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh? You have a gift for me as well, Boss?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh? You have a gift for me as well, Boss?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh? You have a gift for me as well, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ah... what a beautiful flower. I've never seen such a clear and radiant color before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ah... what a beautiful flower. I've never seen such a clear and radiant color before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ah... what a beautiful flower. I've never seen such a clear and radiant color before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. A gift preserved just as it is can carry sincerity that never fades.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. A gift preserved just as it is can carry sincerity that never fades.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. A gift preserved just as it is can carry sincerity that never fades.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The change carefully nurtured with devotion, and the kindness that treasures something just as it is... in the end, both are heartfelt feelings meant for someone precious.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The change carefully nurtured with devotion, and the kindness that treasures something just as it is... in the end, both are heartfelt feelings meant for someone precious.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The change carefully nurtured with devotion, and the kindness that treasures something just as it is... in the end, both are heartfelt feelings meant for someone precious.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Even if this flower should one day wither, I will cherish the feelings within this gift forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Even if this flower should one day wither, I will cherish the feelings within this gift forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Even if this flower should one day wither, I will cherish the feelings within this gift forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Will you continue to teach me about many more things in this world?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Will you continue to teach me about many more things in this world?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Will you continue to teach me about many more things in this world?
